name: Script'em Up
summary: Kira is done with the "glamour" of getting hit by cars. She’s studying to be a Labor Risk Inspector, but her mind is a mess of stunt cues and legal jargon.  Program Kira’s path using logic blocks in 3D space. Solve spatial puzzles and time your moves in real-time. Help her nail the scene in one take so she can finally quit show business!  One take. No mistakes. Can you script her escape?
